text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Welcome! This is where you'll be taking
the Trainer Aptitude Test!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Our goal is to refine trainers' abilities,
enabling them to instruct their trainees
more effectively. It is in your best
interest to fully commit to this effort!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: There is a test for every racing distance. So the knowledge and skills required in each assessment will differ greatly.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
That's not all! When you receive high
enough ratings, you shall be permitted
to undertake more challenging tests! No
skipping grades here, as I'm sure you're
aware.

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Once you manage to pass them all,
perhaps you'll be ready for the most
special test of all...

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
First things first! Get out there and apply
yourself! Overcome your weaknesses and
develop your strengths.
